RewardMeaningText: The Guarded Path brings back enough mana_shard to restart City B's processors without leaning as hard on recovery strain.
CityImpactMeaningText: Restarts refined_mana on a steadier line, even if the guarded route gives up the Greedy Path's ceiling.
RecommendationShiftText: Processing can restart, and City B can stabilize the next dispatch before choosing another aggressive haul.
